# Third-Party Content Audit

Generated by `node tools/audit-rustymilk-content-sources.mjs`.

## Policy Summary

RustyMilk can load old MilkDrop-family content. Clearly licensed content lives under `content/third-party`; aggressive public community imports with unclear/no explicit licenses live under `content/community-unlicensed` and are excluded from default builds unless a distribution explicitly opts in.

## Catalog

| ID | Status | Policy | License | Source | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| rustymilk-sample-pack | vendored | include | CC0-1.0 | examples/sample-pack | RustyMilk-owned fixture pack used by CLI, SDK, player, and Studio integration tests. |
| butterchurn-presets-2.4.7 | vendored | include | MIT | https://www.npmjs.com/package/butterchurn-presets/v/2.4.7 | MIT-licensed converted Butterchurn preset package. Contains 1,754 converted JSON presets plus bundle files. This is not raw .milk source, but it is redistributable and useful for compatibility/import tooling. |
| projectm-cream-of-the-crop | community-vendored | community-unlicensed | NOASSERTION | https://github.com/projectM-visualizer/presets-cream-of-the-crop | Large curated pack used by projectM. The upstream license note says most original preset authors did not publish explicit licenses. Imported under the community-unlicensed policy for compatibility testing and opt-in builds. |
| projectm-milkdrop-original | community-vendored | community-unlicensed | NOASSERTION | https://github.com/projectM-visualizer/presets-milkdrop-original | Original presets from the last official MilkDrop release. Repository has no explicit license file beyond README provenance. Imported under the community-unlicensed policy for compatibility testing and opt-in builds. |
| projectm-milkdrop-texture-pack | community-vendored | community-unlicensed | NOASSERTION | https://github.com/projectM-visualizer/presets-milkdrop-texture-pack | Textures originally released with MilkDrop plus common community textures. Repository has no explicit license file. Imported under the community-unlicensed policy for compatibility testing and opt-in builds. |
| projectm-classic | community-vendored | community-unlicensed | NOASSERTION | https://github.com/projectM-visualizer/presets-projectm-classic | Classic projectM preset collection published until projectM 3.1.12. Repository has no explicit license file. Imported under the community-unlicensed policy for compatibility testing and opt-in builds. |
| projectm-en-d | community-vendored | community-unlicensed | NOASSERTION | https://github.com/projectM-visualizer/presets-en-d | Small En D preset collection. Upstream uses the same no-explicit-license/public-domain-assumption text as Cream of the Crop. Imported under the community-unlicensed policy for compatibility testing and opt-in builds. |
| projectm-community | review | review | NOASSERTION | https://github.com/projectM-visualizer/presets-community | Community preset submission repo. The default branch/content layout needs further review before any copy/link decision. |
| milkdrop3 | link-only | link | NOASSERTION | https://github.com/milkdrop2077/MilkDrop3 | Important compatibility reference for .milk2, sprites, saved images, shader injection, transitions, drag/drop, and saved state behavior. Treat presets/assets as link-only until license terms are confirmed. |
| sourceforge-mdpresetpack | link-only | link | NOASSERTION | https://sourceforge.net/projects/mdpresetpack/files/ | Large historic preset pack. Needs license/provenance review before any redistribution. |
